entries.title: Chapter I - The Threshold
entries.summary: Kael returns to the sealed chamber and discovers it has begun responding to memory like a living witness.

entries.title: Scene I - An Audience of Stone
entries.summary: Seris confronts Kael inside the chamber, forcing the first ideological clash over what the place is for.

entries.title: Play I - The Litany of Glass
entries.summary: Mira stages a ritualized retelling that begins echoing future events, blurring rehearsal and prophecy.
